name: Irish Lamb Stew
recipeIngredient: Boneless leg of lamb, cut into cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the boneless leg of lamb into cubes.
2. Heat oil in a heavy saucepan and add the lamb. Cook until lightly browned, then remove from the pan.
3. Add chopped onions and minced garlic to the pan. Cook for a few minutes.
4. Stir in flour and cook until the mixture turns golden brown.
5. Gradually add beef stock while stirring. Return the meat to the saucepan.
6. Stir in salt, black pepper, rosemary, and bay leaf. Cover and simmer for 1 hour or until the meat is almost tender.
7. Add potatoes, carrots, and turnips. Cook for an additional 30 minutes.
8. Add frozen peas and boiled onions. Continue cooking until the peas are tender, about 10-15 minutes.
